meta.homeTitle: Hang Ha Driving School | A1, A2, B1, B2, and C1 Driving Courses
meta.homeDescription: Hang Ha Driving School provides A1, A2, B1, B2, and C1 driving courses with a consultation landing page, student area, admin dashboard, online exams, and bilingual SEO-friendly content.
meta.loginTitle: Hang Ha Driving School System Login
meta.loginDescription: Login page for admins and students to manage courses, take exams, and review results.
meta.examTitle: Student Area | Hang Ha Driving School
meta.examDescription: Students can review their course, check exam history, take online theory exams, and open result details.
meta.resultTitle: Exam Result | Hang Ha Driving School
meta.resultDescription: Students can review pass or fail status, exam history, and detailed answer explanations after submission.
meta.adminDescription: Admin dashboard to manage students, exams, questions, results, and center analytics.

common.footerText: A complete platform for Hang Ha Driving School to manage students and online exams in one connected system.

footer.address: B23 - 16 Cienco 5, Tan Lap, Dan Phuong, Hanoi
footer.locationsTitle: Find the nearest branch for consultation, document submission, and a flexible study schedule
footer.locationsCopy: Students can visit the main campus directly or choose the nearest branch for detailed consultation, faster document submission, and a flexible driving-study schedule that fits their personal time.
footer.mainAddress: B23 - 16 Cienco 5, Tan Lap, Dan Phuong, Hanoi
footer.branchOneName: Hang Ha Driving School - Dan Phuong
footer.branchTwoName: Hang Ha Driving School - Ha Dong
footer.supportOne: The center proactively creates student accounts after course registration is completed, helping learners start studying and reviewing quickly.
footer.supportTwo: Students can easily review their course, take online exams, and track results after every submission.
footer.supportThree: The dashboard is optimized for driving schools, supporting efficient management, tracking, and daily operations.

home.title: Register for A1, A2, B1, B2, and C1 driving courses easily and track exam results on any device
home.subtitle: The online learning and exam platform of Hang Ha Driving School supports course consultation, student login, online practice tests, and detailed result tracking after every submission.
home.heroNote: Student accounts are prepared by the center. Learners only need to log in to review their course and exam results.
home.trustOneText: Only admins can create student accounts, assign exams, and manage the full center workflow.
home.trustTwoText: Reputable training, structured teaching, and committed support help learners complete the journey and obtain their license on schedule.
home.trustThreeText: All key content is bilingual to support consultation and improve SEO from the beginning.
home.introTitle: A management system for learning and taking driving-license exams
home.processOneText: The student leaves contact details, the center follows up, and the right course and schedule are confirmed.
home.processTwoText: The admin creates the student account, assigns the course, and shares login details.
home.processThreeText: Students log in, review their course, take online exams, and revisit answers after each submission.
home.processFourText: The admin dashboard updates exam outcomes, registrations, and student progress right away.
home.packagesTitle: Choose the learning path that fits each learner's needs
home.packageA1: A basic course for learners taking the standard motorbike license, with a compact schedule and quick enrollment support.
home.packageA2: A structured course for learners who need a large-displacement motorbike license and want proper guidance.
home.packageB1: A learning path for automatic cars that combines theory study with guided exam preparation.
home.packageB2: The most popular course, with online exams, attempt tracking, and a management dashboard.
home.packageC1: A C1 course for learners who need a clear practical-learning path, document support, and guided exam preparation.
home.campusTitle: Real images from the branches of Hang Ha Driving School
home.campusCopy: Real images from the branches of Hang Ha Driving School, where learners are welcomed, consulted, and trained in a professional environment.
home.campusMainText: The main consultation and document-receiving area, suitable for learners in Dan Phuong and the northwestern area of Hanoi.
home.campusBranchOneTitle: Hang Ha Driving School - Dan Phuong
home.campusBranchOneText: A document-receiving point near schools, suitable for learners in the Hanoi area.
home.campusBranchTwoTitle: Hang Ha Driving School - Ha Dong
home.campusBranchTwoText: A compact consultation area with convenient weekend scheduling for working learners.
home.campusPracticeTitle: Driving yard with flexible training shifts
home.campusPracticeText: The practical training area is arranged in morning, afternoon, and evening shifts for easier scheduling.
home.campusClassroomTitle: Theory room and exam simulation support
home.campusClassroomText: Students can review theory, complete trial tests, and receive direct guidance in class.
home.feedbackTitle: Real comments after training and exams
home.feedbackCopy: Real feedback from learners after experiencing courses and licensing exams at Hang Ha Driving School helps us improve service quality and deliver a better learning experience.
home.reviewScoreCopy: Ratings are updated from real learner feedback without manual filtering.
home.reviewOneText: My schedule was arranged flexibly, and I could choose weekend classes, which was very suitable for a working learner like me.
home.reviewTwoText: My student account was prepared in advance, so I only needed to log in to review my course and take online exams. It was very convenient and easy to use.
home.reviewThreeText: The mobile interface is simple to use, and I can review theory and answer explanations right after submitting.
home.reviewFourText: The center has multiple branches, so going to class is very convenient. I could change my schedule quickly without interruption.
home.reviewFiveText: Theory guidance was straightforward, and online tests showed me immediately which questions needed more practice.
home.reviewSixText: I find the center's review materials very well updated, complete, and easy to understand. It is especially helpful that both Vietnamese and English are available for foreign friends.
home.formTitle: Receive a course path and tuition estimate in five minutes
home.formSupport: Please leave your information so we can contact you as soon as possible.
home.formPointOne: No account is required to request consultation
home.formPointTwo: The admin contacts the learner and creates a student account after confirmation
home.formPointThree: Information is stored right away for center tracking and reporting
home.ctaTitle: Ready to start the driving license journey?
home.ctaText: Receive a suitable study plan, tuition estimate, and exam schedule today.

login.title: System login
login.subtitle: Admins manage the dashboard, while students enter their own course area, take exams, and review results after each submission.
login.hint: If you do not have an account yet, please contact the center for login details.
login.helperOne: Only admins can create student accounts.
login.sideTitle: Built for small and medium-sized businesses
login.sideOne: Admins can review leads, students, exam outcomes, and question banks in one workspace.
login.sideTwo: Students land on one simple page to review their course and take exams.
login.sideThree: Vietnamese and English are both supported for a clearer experience.

student.heroCopy: This is where students can review their course, check whether they passed, and take online exams for practice.
student.nextStepOne: Review the course details and exam name above.
student.nextStepTwo: Take the exam carefully and submit it. The system grades it immediately.
student.nextStepThree: If you do not pass yet, review the answers and take the exam again to practice more.
student.historyCopy: Students can review pass or fail status and reopen each result detail.
student.historyEmpty: You have not taken any exams yet.
student.noAttemptCopy: You have not submitted this exam yet.

exam.title: Online exam room
exam.subtitle: Welcome
exam.empty: There is no active exam available right now.
exam.toastRetakeAvailable: This student can retake the exam. A new attempt will be saved.

result.title: Exam result
result.criticalFail: Failed because of a critical question.
result.historyCopy: Students can track every attempt and see whether they passed.
result.reviewCopy: Review your choice, the correct answer, and the explanation provided by the admin.
result.noExplanation: No explanation is available for this question yet.

admin.title: Admin dashboard
admin.studentsTableCopy: Student accounts created and managed by the admin team.
admin.registrationsTableCopy: Fresh leads from the landing page appear here for follow-up.
admin.examListCopy: Create, edit, and delete exams inside modals, then refresh the dashboard instantly.
admin.recentResultsCopy: Review pass or fail status and critical-question outcomes in one place.
admin.questionListCopy: Filter by exam, critical questions, and keywords to manage the bank faster.
admin.searchQuestionPlaceholder: Type keywords to search question content
admin.heroCopy: Track students, registrations, exam outcomes, and center data from one admin workspace.
admin.overviewCopy: The dashboard refreshes immediately after each save or delete action.
admin.modalStudentCopy: Add a new student and push it straight into the managed list.
admin.modalExamCopy: Once saved, the exam list and dashboard refresh automatically.
admin.modalQuestionCopy: Manage the question bank and critical questions inside a focused popup form.
admin.confirmBody: Are you sure you want to continue with this action?
admin.deleteExamBody: Are you sure you want to delete this exam?
admin.deleteQuestionBody: Are you sure you want to delete this question?
admin.emptyQuestions: No questions match the current filters.
